title: MusicUpdate
description: Music/media player state via MPRIS2. Delta model — only changed fields are sent after the initial snapshot.

player.description: Player application name (e.g. 'Spotify', 'mpv', 'Rhythmbox'); null when no player active

album_art_b64.description: Base64-encoded PNG album art, 200x200 pixels; null when unavailable

duration_ms.description: Track duration in milliseconds; null when unavailable

position_ms.description: Current playback position in milliseconds; null when unavailable

volume.description: Playback volume as a value from 0.0 (silent) to 1.0 (full); null when unavailable

state.description: Current playback state; null when no player is active
